mapper.select: SELECT group_id AS groupId, allow_member_create AS allowMemberCreate, requires_approval AS requiresApproval, def_sub_can_manage_schedule AS defSubCanManageSchedule, def_sub_can_manage_member AS defSubCanManageMember, def_sub_can_manage_nickname AS defSubCanManageNickname, allow_self_nickname AS allowSelfNickname, requires_attendance_approval AS requiresAttendanceApproval, visibility_type AS visibilityType, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM group_schedule_policy WHERE group_id = #{groupId}
